_comment: Syntax Corporation (c) 2026 - EBS Contract Renewal PAF - OCI managed-MCP tool definitions. Mirror of LiveEBSRepository + XXPAF_RENEWAL_PKG; register each in the OCI Database Tools console (SQL Report or PL/SQL custom tool). SQL bodies are in ebs/managed_mcp_tools.sql.
auth: OAuth2 (IAM identity domain) or Personal Access Token

tools.name: get_agreement_lines
tools.desc: Current agreement price lines + item activity (po_lines_all, mtl_system_items_b).

tools.name: resolve_uom_code
tools.desc: PDOI UOM_CODE for a UOM name (e.g. 'Each' -> 'Ea').

tools.name: get_latest_item_price
tools.desc: Latest priced PO line for an item (blog Step 2: latest EBS price); apply upcharge to derive the new-term price.

write_path: OFF the MCP — load via standard 'Import Price Catalogs' (PDOI) or a governed XXPAF job. DML tool only if confirmed at install.
least_privilege_user: XXPAF_MCP_RO: SELECT on the read objects + EXECUTE on XXPAF.XXPAF_RENEWAL_PKG; no DML grants.
